---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: type:feature
assignees: ''
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
Describe the problem or need. The problem matters more than a specific solution -
understanding the "why" comes before the "how".

**User story**
As a <type of user>, I want <goal> so that <benefit>.

**Acceptance criteria**
Concrete, checkable outcomes that would make this done:

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

**Out of scope (optional)**
Anything deliberately left out - naming it early keeps the change focused and
prevents scope creep.

**Alternatives you've considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else - examples, links, mockups.
